reviews.review_description: Absolutely insanely good game an here’s why. So first there are a lot of custom cosmetics (I say them at end) there is trusted, the staff team is really nice, everyone is active, a bunch of mod menus idk how many but it’s a lot. There is a trusted user title, good lobby music. And the custom cosmetics is the (grimace shake, Roblox sword, Roblox cheeseburger, and a revolver,) if I had to rate it I’d give it a 10/10 great game best gtag copy ever made. P.S. the servers don’t work because servers are full.
